failedAssertions.reason: STT models endpoint returns empty array. The symlink 'sherpa-onnx-whisper-tiny.en' is not detected as a directory by entry.isDirectory() on macOS (readdirSync returns symlink as symlink, not directory). Fix: Use fs.statSync instead of fs.lstatSync to check isDirectory(), or explicitly check isSymbolicLink() and handle symlinks.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Auth middleware blocks profile creation - POST /api/profile requires auth token

blockers.description: STT models endpoint returns empty array. The symlink 'sherpa-onnx-whisper-tiny.en' in servers/stt/ is not detected as a directory by entry.isDirectory() on macOS. readdirSync returns symlinks as symlinks, not directories. The code only checks isDirectory() without handling symlinks. Fix: Check isSymbolicLink() first using lstatSync, or use statSync (which follows symlinks) instead of readdirSync's isDirectory().

Auth middleware does not include '/profile' as public path. The fix from commit 59adb57 (adding '/profile' to PUBLIC_PATHS) was reverted in later commits. POST /api/profile requires auth token, blocking browser-based profile creation during onboarding.

frictions: Browser registration flow creates account but does not navigate to profile form - button click times out
Onboarding flow requires profile creation before accessing Settings page, but profile creation via browser is blocked
notes: Testing was performed against localhost:3101 (frontend) and localhost:3100 (backend). Profile creation via API works (with token), but browser flow is blocked by auth middleware. Two root causes need fixing: (1) STT models symlink detection bug, (2) Auth middleware PUBLIC_PATHS reverted.
